project_type: TypeScript pnpm monorepo - Fastify 5 backends + Next.js 15 frontends
test_framework: vitest (all packages use vitest run, workspace vitest.config.ts at root)
verification_instructions: 1. pnpm turbo typecheck (all pass) 2. pnpm turbo build (all pass) 3. pnpm turbo test (all pass) 4. pnpm turbo lint (all pass)
snapshot_or_generated_files: packages/database uses prisma generate (generates @prisma/client from schema.prisma). Run 'prisma generate --schema=prisma/schema.prisma' inside packages/database.
setup_instructions: pnpm install at root. Node 22 required. pnpm-workspace.yaml: apps/*, packages/*, services/*
environment_constraints: OPEN_INTERNET - full network access. Node 22 available via nvm.
contribution_requirements: All packages must export from src/index.ts. Use workspace:* for internal deps. Include scripts: build, typecheck, test, lint. Use zod for validation. Follow fastify-plugin pattern for server plugins.

key_patterns.server_plugins: packages/server-core/src/plugins/ - use fastify-plugin (fp) wrapper, decorate fastify instance
key_patterns.admin_pages: apps/admin/src/app/<section>/page.tsx - Next.js App Router pages with 'use client', use @quant/shared-ui components (Card, Badge, Button)
key_patterns.admin_api: apps/admin/src/app/api/<resource>/route.ts - Next.js route handlers (GET, POST, PUT, DELETE)
key_patterns.package_structure: Each package: package.json, tsconfig.json, vitest.config.ts, src/index.ts, src/__tests__/
key_patterns.prisma_schema: packages/database/prisma/schema.prisma - single schema file, all models go here
key_patterns.helm_chart: infra/helm/quant-platform/ - existing chart with templates/deployments.yaml, services.yaml, hpa.yaml, pdb.yaml, values.yaml (services map pattern)

directory_structure: apps/ (17 apps: admin, quantmail, quantchat, quantai, quantmeet, etc.) | packages/ (80+ shared packages: server-core, database, realtime, auth, common, etc.) | services/ (8: ws-gateway, smtp-inbound, etc.) | infra/ (helm, terraform, otel, grafana, etc.)
